name: Anchovy Zuppetta, Rowboat Style
recipeIngredient: 1 Pound anchovies or sardines, cleaned and gutted
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 12 to 14-inch sauté pan, heat the oil until smoking.
2. Add the jalapenos, almonds, and onions and cook until softened and lightly browned, about 2 to 3 minutes.
3. Add the white wine and tomato sauce and bring to a boil.
4. Add the anchovies and return to boil.
5. Lower the heat to simmer and cook through, about 8 to 10 minutes.
6. Pour into warm bowls, sprinkle with scallions, basil, and mint.
7. Serve with grilled bread drizzled with good oil.
Yield: 4 servings
